hero.label: Developer
hero.heading: Crafting digital experiences.
hero.subtitle: Senior Front End Developer with 10+ years building modern web and mobile products at scale.

bio.label: About me
bio.heading: Code runs in my veins.
bio.text1: I'm a passionate frontend developer with 10+ years of experience building modern web applications. I've worked as a Senior Front End Developer at companies like NICE and Playvox, crafting exceptional user experiences at scale.
bio.text2: I specialize in Vue, React, Next.js and TypeScript. Beyond web, I build mobile apps with React Native — including my own indie studio myappcube, with two social games live on iOS and Android.
bio.openToWorkSub: Available for new projects and collaborations.

nice.desc: Building enterprise-grade web applications for one of the world's leading customer experience companies. Crafting scalable UI systems used by thousands of agents globally.

playvox.desc: Developed the core frontend of a workforce management platform for contact centers. Worked with Vue 3, TypeScript and large-scale data visualization.

cta.heading: Let's build something great.
cta.sub: Open to new opportunities, freelance projects and collaborations.
